programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: A couple have been looking forward to enjoying their golden years together, caravanning with their spaniels Zach and Ollie. But after Ollie had an operation, the brothers had a big falling-out and have been at war ever since. Can Graeme Hall rescue their retirement? Randy Rupert the labradoodle has only one thing on his mind... trying to get his leg over with the lady of the house. Mum-of-two Bobbi has had enough of this shaggy boy's unrequited love, and with a toddler and baby to look after, she's at the end of her tether. Plus, Graeme offers top tips on doggie nail clipping. Prods/Dirs: Michael Nuvoletta/Owen Griffiths/Gyorgy Nanasi; Exec Prods: Tim Quicke/Jamie Isaacs/Will Stanford; Avalon Factual (S8 Ep6)
Graeme seeks to save bewildered owners from their four-legged friends' terrible behaviour.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder
programme.desc: Two old flames, Alex and Lucia, reunite in the Ibiza nightclub where they first kissed some 20 years previously. Alex is on a lads' holiday with his lairy mate Gary, and Lucia now co-owns the club. But when Lucia's slimy business associate Rico is murdered - pushed off the balcony at the club - Jack and Kate get on the case. Various suspects emerge, including Lucia, and local mafia boss Carmen Rivera, as well as her henchman Paco. Meanwhile, in the wake of learning about Marlowe's illness, Jack remains at odds with Kate, but he can't stay mad with her for long and the pair eventually reach a new understanding. Writer: Kat Rose-Martin; Series Prod: Jonathan Phillips; Prod/Dir: Steve Hughes; Exec Prods: Andy Morgan/Paul Matthew Thompson; Clapperboard Studios (S3 Ep7)
There's a murder in every port in this drama set in the sunny Mediterranean.
